title: Get Android 12 now: More personal, safe, and effortless.
description:
Introducing Android 12
More personal, safe, and effortless than ever before.

Your device will be updated to Android 12. Learn more at android.com/12.

New features include:
- Personalized design that adapts to the color of your wallpaper
- A widget for your most important conversations
- Scrolling screenshots
- Status bar indicators that show when your mic or camera are being accessed
- Quick controls to turn off your mic or camera
- More privacy controls

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.
